Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Studying at your desk takes some time, but {f 4 30 0 1 1 0} will increase.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}On days when you don't have school, you may choose to take advantage of your afternoon by studying.[n]{f 1 1}
